Accept: tsc clean, lint 0w/0e MILESTONE preserved, build green, manual visual diff via admin campaign dry-run (Gmail + Outlook web + iOS Mail screenshots attached to commit body or docs/audits/email-brand-2026-04-24.md). DO NOT touch files owned by older commits (homepage sections #481, cookie-banner #483, product-gallery #482, PDP sold layout #489, globals.css lightbox #488, invoice generators #490, jarvis-remote-frame #492). QA exit=143 pattern: keep each template redesign atomic (<2min lint+tsc+build loop per file).

Scope must be strict: only affects @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars, only adds the two pattern options, only ^_ prefix. Do NOT blanket-disable the rule. Do NOT add per-file overrides.
